attributes.text: Order motors, pumps, and safety gear in bulk

attributes.fullText: Negotiate and lock in custom rates tailored to your business needs, ensuring consistent and predictable pricing for every purchase.
Assign roles and permissions to different team members, enabling secure collaboration and streamlined account management.
Save time with quick reordering of past purchases or upload product lists in bulk for fast, hassle-free procurement.
Leverage Salesforce integration for smarter workflows, real-time insights, and a seamless sales and support experience.
